code-runner.executorMap.c: cd $dir && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path order_book.c) { gcc -I../lib main.c order_book.c red_black_tree.c fibonacci_heap.c -o main -lm; ./main } else { gcc main.c optimized.c rbtree.c fibheap.c baseline.c order.c trade.c scenario.c performance.c -o main -lm; ./main }"
code-runner.executorMap.cpp: cd $dir && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path order_book.c) { g++ -I../lib main.c order_book.c red_black_tree.c fibonacci_heap.c -o main -lm; ./main } else { g++ main.c optimized.c rbtree.c fibheap.c baseline.c order.c trade.c scenario.c performance.c -o main -lm; ./main }"
